title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindalco Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindalco Industries
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries:
Hindalco Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries!
